MaaS

Mid-D-Man presents

Maybe-as-a-Service

"Like Schrödinger's cat, the answer is simultaneously yes and no —
until observed, at which point it is still maybe."

Service Answer Certainty
yes-as-a-service Yes High
no-as-a-service No Also high
maybe-as-a-service Maybe Do not ask
Communiqué

Press the button below for a non-committal response.

The trinity — Yes  ·  No  ·  Maybe
